analysis.name: Bedrock
analysis.summary: BR代币近期上涨约30%，受BTCFi叙事和流动性再质押概念推动，但链上流动性极低（仅6512美元），存在操纵风险。基本面尚可，但估值偏高，建议观望。

recommendation.invalidation: 流动性持续低迷或价格跌破0.14美元

latestNews.title: Bedrock BR Token Price Today: Trading Near $0.175 — BTC Liquid Restaking Momentum
latestNews.reason: 提及BTC流动性再质押动能，可能吸引关注

latestNews.title: MEXC Introduces Bedrock (BR) Listing with Spot & Futures
latestNews.reason: CEX上线增加流动性和曝光

latestNews.title: Bedrock Introduces Proof of Staking Liquidity (PoSL) and Launches BR Airdrop Checker
latestNews.reason: 创新机制和空投活动提升参与度

fundamentals: Bedrock是多链流动性再质押协议，支持BTC、ETH等资产
BR代币用于治理，通过锁定为veBR获得投票权
总供应量10亿，流通2.5125亿，流通市值约3847万美元
项目已上线MEXC、Bitget等CEX，但链上流动性极低
marketRead: 链上交易对BR/WPOL流动性仅6512美元，24小时交易量0.07美元，极不活跃
CEX交易量较大，但链上数据失真，价格可能被操纵
risks: 链上流动性极低，存在价格操纵和滑点风险
代币解锁压力：总供应量10亿，流通仅25%，未来大量解锁
项目较新，合约风险未充分暴露
sourceNotes: 链上数据来自DexScreener，流动性极低，价格参考意义有限
新闻来源为Google News聚合，部分时效性较差

profile.name: Bedrock
profile.description: Bedrock DAO is a governance framework for managing decisions within the Bedrock ecosystem. It enables BR token holders to participate in governance by converting BR into veBR, a voting escrow token. Governance decisions include protocol parameters, incentive structures, and liquidity allocation. The governance system is based on veBR, which is obtained by locking BR tokens at a 1:1 ratio. The longer the lock duration, the greater the voting power. veBR holders vote on governance proposals, including gauge allocations that determine incentive distribution across liquidity pools.
